name: Jesse Kegley
roleLine: Robotics Engineering student at UC Santa Cruz, automation intern at a rocket startup, and certified aerospace TIG welder.
summary: I design, build, and program electromechanical systems, from raw stock to closed-loop control. Before robotics school I welded for a living, and I still run the fabrication business I started in 2022.
availability: Open to internships in embedded systems, controls, mechatronics, and manufacturing engineering.

stats.label: American Welding Society certs — aerospace TIG (D17.1) & structural stick (D1.5)
field-oriented control loop, written from scratch in bare-metal C
